tagline: Claim Your Place in the Stars

headings.description: Used for display, H1-H4 headings, premium and luxurious feel.

body.description: Clean, readable, geometric sans for all body text, UI elements, and buttons.

accent.description: Used for italic quotes, personalized star stories, elegant labels.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-24) to emulate a luxury boutique. High emphasis on negative space.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Asymmetrical for Marketing pages, structured for Dashboard and Marketplace.

cards.base_class: bg-[#0F1F3D]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-lg

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A84C] hover:bg-[#E0BB6A] text-[#050A1A] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#8899BB]/30 hover:border-[#F0F4FF] text-[#F0F4FF] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.glass: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2

navigation.style: Crystal Glass sticky header. z-50. bg-[#050A1A]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/5.

icons.instructions: Avoid emoji characters completely. Use Lucide React icons with consistent stroke widths.

animations.hero_background: Animated 300+ star particle canvas background. Implement using tsParticles or pure HTML5 Canvas. Should include shooting star animations occasionally.
animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion fade-in and slight Y-axis reveal (translateY: 20px -> 0px, opacity: 0 -> 1).
animations.hover_effects: Cards should slightly lift (-translate-y-1) with an intensified glow on their respective tier border colors.
animations.notifications: Live notification popup (bottom-left, every 30-60s) sliding in from left, fading out.

hero_backgrounds.description: Dynamic scene of colorful gas clouds and stars in a cosmic nebula.

textures_and_accents.description: Stunning image of the Lagoon Nebula
textures_and_accents.usage: Card backgrounds with low opacity, hover reveals

textures_and_accents.description: Abstract golden light shines against black.
textures_and_accents.usage: Premium tier borders, gold accents, certificate foil textures

products_mockups.usage: Certificate preview in checkout / product showcase

homepage.hero: Hero overlay opacity max bg-black/40 so the nebula image and particles shine through. Center-aligned luxurious typography (H1).
homepage.live_ticker: Use the Marquee strategy (The 'Editorial Ribbon') below hero. bg-[#0A1628] with #C9A84C text. Tracking-wide.
homepage.zodiac_picker: 12-item grid, bento style or circular carousel.
homepage.pricing: 5 tiers displayed in Glassmorphism cards. Highlight 'Legendary' with gold glow.

marketplace.layout: Control Room grid. Dense, analytical but still luxurious. Focus on % increase and original vs asking price.
marketplace.table: Use Shadcn Table customized with transparent backgrounds and #0F1F3D headers.

checkout.flow: 5-step modal wizard. Steps: personalize, package, preview certificate, payment mockup, celebration. Use Framer motion to animate between steps smoothly.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over gradients/images uses text-shadow or backgrounds to meet APCA contrast ratios. --text-primary against --bg-card meets AA minimums.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid="buy-star-cta").

development_instructions.css: Use Tailwind classes. For custom colors, add them to tailwind.config.js under theme.extend.colors.
development_instructions.shadcn: Heavily customize Shadcn components. Strip the default Vercel-look. Add backdrop-blur, change border radiuses (rounded-2xl for main cards), and replace neutral borders with white/10.
development_instructions.html: DO NOT USE <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn components for forms.
development_instructions.fonts: Import 'Cinzel', 'DM Sans', and 'Cormorant Garamond' from Google Fonts.
